recommendations.title: Hostage Radio
recommendations.overview: A radio host is kidnapped on air and forced to tell secrets about his past.

recommendations.title: The Rental
recommendations.overview: Two couples on an oceanside getaway grow suspicious that the host of their seemingly perfect rental house may be spying on them. Before long, what should have been a celebratory weekend trip turns into something far more sinister.

recommendations.title: The Children
recommendations.overview: A relaxing Christmas vacation turns into a terrifying fight for survival as the children begin to turn on their parents.

recommendations.title: No Escape Room
recommendations.overview: A father and daughter check out a small town escape room and discover there is something sinister about the place.

recommendations.title: The Night Listener
recommendations.overview: In the midst of his crumbling relationship, a radio show host begins speaking to his biggest fan—a young boy—via the telephone. But when questions about the boy's identity come up, the host's life is thrown into chaos.

recommendations.title: Stan Helsing
recommendations.overview: A spoof on many horror movie series. Ending his shift at the video rental, Stan's picked up by his BFF and 2 cute girls, all going to a Halloween party. Will they even get there?

recommendations.title: 14 Cameras
recommendations.overview: When a family of four rent a beautiful house for their summer vacation, the price seems too good to be true. Unbeknownst to them, the lascivious owner has set up a series of spy cams throughout the house, documenting their most intimate moments and l

recommendations.title: Leave the World Behind
recommendations.overview: A family's getaway to a luxurious rental home takes an ominous turn when a cyberattack knocks out their devices—and two strangers appear at their door.

recommendations.title: Vacancy 2: The First Cut
recommendations.overview: Three young people check into the Meadow View Inn for a night's rest, fully unaware of the inn's sick-minded employees and their nefarious intentions.

recommendations.title: Welcome Home
recommendations.overview: A couple try to repair their damaged union in an Italian vacation paradise. Then they discover the owner's intentions.
